title: Quickly Mine Turtle Eggs│快速挖掘海龜蛋
description: Mining turtle eggs now destroys them all at once, rather than one at a time.│挖掘海龜蛋現在會一次摧毀所有海龜蛋，而不是一次摧毀一個。
body:
# Function│功能
- Mining turtle eggs while not sneaking will destroy all turtle eggs in the block. If the tool used to mine is enchanted with Silk Touch, the number of turtle eggs dropped after breaking the block will be equal to the number of turtle eggs in the block.│在非潛行狀態下挖掘海龜蛋會破壞該方塊所有的海龜蛋。如果挖掘時使用的工具有精準採集附魔，那麼在破壞後掉落的海龜蛋數量會與該方塊內含有的海龜蛋數量相同。
- Mining turtle eggs while sneaking will retain the vanilla behavior, breaking one turtle egg at a time within the block.│在潛行狀態下挖掘海龜蛋會保持原版行為，一次破壞該方塊內的一顆海龜蛋。
